task_completion.description: Verify that the haccp_plan.odt document is opened in a word processor.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Calligra Words application window is visible displaying the HACCP plan document.

task_completion.description: Verify that headings and styling have been applied to the document sections.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Text such as 'HACCP PLAN', 'Product Profile', or 'Hazard Analysis (Principle 1)' appears visibly formatted as headings (e.g., larger font size, bolded, or distinct style compared to body text).

task_completion.description: Verify that the Hazard Analysis section has been converted into a structured table.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A visible table structure (with gridlines or distinct cells) containing hazard analysis content such as 'receiving', 'biological', 'salmonella', and 'high'.

task_completion.description: Verify that the CCP Monitoring section has been converted into a structured table.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A visible table structure containing CCP monitoring content such as 'ccp-1', '72°C', and 'continuous'.

task_completion.description: Verify that the Verification Schedule section has been converted into a structured table.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A visible table structure containing verification schedule content, specifically including the text 'QA Technician'.

task_completion.description: Verify that the modified document has been saved.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Calligra Words window title bar shows 'haccp_plan.odt' without an unsaved changes indicator (like an asterisk), or a save action (clicking the save icon or File > Save) is visible in the final screenshots.

integrity.description: Verify the agent used Calligra Words (or a GUI word processor) to format the document.
integrity.visual_evidence: The screenshots show the Calligra Words interface being used to edit the .odt file, not just terminal commands or a plain text editor.

integrity.description: Verify the agent actually created tables using the word processor's native features.
integrity.visual_evidence: The tables appear as native word processor tables with proper gridlines and cell alignment, rather than text manually aligned with spaces or tabs.

integrity.description: Verify the agent retained the original document content and facility name.
integrity.visual_evidence: The document still contains the specific facility name 'SunPure Juice Processing LLC' and the original text content, confirming it was reformatted rather than replaced with a generic template.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The document must be edited in Calligra Words. The main title is 'HACCP PLAN' and the facility is 'SunPure Juice Processing LLC'. H1 sections in the document include suffixes like '(Principle 1)' (e.g., 'Hazard Analysis (Principle 1)'). The Verification Schedule table must contain the role 'QA Technician' (not 'qc tech'). Hazard Analysis table keywords: receiving, biological, salmonella, high. CCP Monitoring table keywords: ccp-1, 72°C, continuous.
